---
title: "Pipeline with Functions"
author: "Julia Shoobe"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# Load Libraries
library(RODBC)
library(tidyverse)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)

# Source all functions in `Pipeline Functions/` folder
function_files <- list.files("Pipeline Functions", pattern = "\\.R$", full.names = TRUE)
invisible(lapply(function_files, source))
```

# Load Datasets
```{r load datasets}
# Encounters data for DUH ED on/after July 1, 2024
encounters <- read.csv("Datasets/encounters.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# lab data
labs <- read.csv("Datasets/labs.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Demographics data
demographics <- read.csv("Datasets/demographics.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Diagnosis data for ED encounter type
diagnosis <- read.csv("Datasets/diagnosis.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) |> select(-ENC_TYPE)

# Conditions data 
conditions <- read.csv("Datasets/conditions.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Procedures data for patients who were admitted to DUH ED on/after July 1, 2024 with LAB3234
procedures <- read.csv("Datasets/procedures.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Med Admin data for patients who were admitted to DUH ED on/after July 1, 2024 with LAB3234
med_admin <- read.csv("Datasets/med_admin.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Vitals data for patients who were admitted to DUH on/after July 1, 2024 with LAB3234
vitals <- read.csv("Datasets/vitals.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# all ED provider notes for unique ENCOUNTERIDs with LAB3234 admitted to DUH ED on/after July 1, 2024
notes <- read.csv("Datasets/ed_provider_notes.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) |> 
  filter(REPORT_TYPE == "ED Provider Notes") |> 
  select(PATID, ENCOUNTERID, REPORT_TEXT)

# Notes without CEU Notes
no_ceu_notes <- read.csv("Datasets/no_ceu_notes.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# MRNs
mrn <- read.csv("Datasets/mrns.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
```

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Cohort Selection
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```{r cohort}
# Build encounter-level cohort with relevant troponin labs and flags
## Make sure to remove 60 ENCOUNTERIDs used in testing (vector - `remove`)
cohort <- create_cohort(encounters, labs, notes)

patids <- cohort$PATID
encounterids <- cohort$ENCOUNTERID
```

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Setting up Azure AI
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Construct Azure Endpoint URL 
```{r azure endpoint}
# Azure Endpoint
endpoint <- "https://dhd-mme4lab-oa01.openai.azure.com/"

# Grab key from 'keyring'
keyring::key_set("openai_api")
key <- keyring::key_get("openai_api")

# Set up deployment's name
deployment <- "gpt-5" # Available models: gpt-4, gpt-4o, gpt-4.1, o4-mini

# Construct completions endpoint
completions_endpoint <- paste0(
  endpoint,
  "openai/deployments/",
  deployment,
  "/chat/completions?api-version=2025-01-01-preview"
)
```

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Exclusion Criteria
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Rule Out 1 - ECG Shows Evidence of Acute MI or Ischemia Pattern
```{r}
# Determine EC1 exclusion based on structured diagnosis and heparin administration
structured_ec1 <- ruleout1_structured(cohort, diagnosis, med_admin)

# Determine EC1 exclusion based on review of clinical notes
notes_ec1 <- ruleout1_notes(cohort, notes)

# Combine structured and note-based EC1 determinations into a single EC1 flag
cohort_ec1 <- combine_ec1(structured_ec1, notes_ec1)
```

## Rule Out 2 - Unstable Vital Signs
```{r}
# Determine EC2 exclusion based on vital signs extracted from clinical notes
ec2 <- ruleout2_notes(cohort, notes)
```

## Rule Out 3 - Uncontrollable Chest Pain Concerning for ACS
```{r}
# Determine EC3 exclusion based on notes describing refractory chest pain
ec3 <- ruleout3_notes(cohort, notes)
```

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
HEART Calculation
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
## History
```{r}
# Compute HEART history component score from note-based symptom assessment
heart_history <- heart_history_calculation(notes, cohort)
```

## EKG
```{r}
# Compute HEART ECG/EKG component score from note-based ECG interpretation
heart_ekg <- heart_ekg_calculation(notes, cohort)
```

## Age
```{r}
# Compute HEART age component score using patient birthdate
heart_age <- heart_age_calculation(cohort, demographics)
```

## Risk Factors
```{r}
# Compute HEART risk factor component score from past medical conditions
heart_rf <- heart_rf_calculation(cohort, conditions)
```

## Initial Troponin
```{r}
# Compute HEART troponin component score based on numeric troponin value
heart_trop <- heart_trop_calculation(cohort)
```

## HEART
```{r}
# Combine all HEART components to calculate total HEART score per encounter
heart <- calculate_heart(heart_history, heart_ekg, heart_age, heart_rf, heart_trop)
```

# Decision
```{r}
# Determine CEU eligibility and provide clinical instructions based on HEART score and EC flags
decision <- ceu_decision(heart, cohort_ec1, ec2, ec3) 

write.csv(decision, "Datasets/decision.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
